reviews.review_description: This game sucks its so laggy no playfab and its so easy to get outside of the map, the walls all so buggy you can go through them
I love your game, and I watch you on YouTube, so keep going at YouTube and all Monke

So when I went in it was OK at first then I want to game modes when I went to glass bridge. I was doing glass bridge then when I fell it wouldn’t let me respawn instead, it left me in the lava and then I was outside of the map.

Until I want to game modes, I went to horror and it was dark. I couldn’t see anything yet only thing I could see was the rules which was to get pineapples then I saw the exit button I was trying to get out but it wouldn’t let me instead it left me in horror I had to restart my game.
The game’s gravity is horrible, I feel like it needs to be like the gorilla tags gravity especially for don’t fall.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! And this will be fixed in the next update
